9806._nv_tagline: A triple-agonist peptide targeting GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors for advanced metabolic research.
9806._nv_spec_1: GLP-1 / GIP / glucagon triple receptor agonist
9806._nv_specs_html:
Sequence: Synthetic analog (39 amino acids)
Molecular weight: ~4,600 Da
Appearance: White to off-white lyophilized powder
Solubility: Soluble in bacteriostatic water
Purity: ≥99% (HPLC)
Storage form: Lyophilized
9806._nv_shipping_html: Ships via cold-chain (insulated packaging with ice packs). Standard delivery: 3-5 business days within the continental US. Expedited shipping available at checkout.
9806._nv_storage_html: Store lyophilized vials at -20°C. Protect from light and moisture. After reconstitution with bacteriostatic water, store at 2-8°C and use within 28 days. Do not freeze reconstituted solution.
9806._nv_disclaimer: For research use only. Not for human or veterinary use. Not a drug, food, or cosmetic. Not for diagnostic or therapeutic use.
